name: Mermaid Class Diagram — Research Paper Object Model
input: Create a class diagram showing a research paper object model: Paper has title, abstract, doi. Paper contains many Authors (name, affiliation, orcid). Paper has many References. Paper belongs to Journal (name, impactFactor). Paper has ReviewStatus (submitted, underReview, accepted, rejected).
qualityCriteria: No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: UML class diagram with attributes, methods, and relationship annotations.

data.caption: Research paper domain model with UML class relationships
